response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 20 years of software engineering and current relevant AI/agentic work at re:cinq; however, the resume doesn't explicitly demonstrate the required 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions delivery. Missing Python (a required language) and explicit vector database/RAG expertise. Current role suggests rapid trajectory toward requirements, making this a potential fit with some gaps.
strengths: Deep technical foundation spanning 20 years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with demonstrated staff-level leadership and mentoring
Current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure, MCP frameworks, and agentic workflows—exactly the technical domain required by the position
Proven TypeScript expertise (required), cloud platform experience (AWS CDK at Optilyz), and strong consulting/leadership presence across multiple organizations
concerns: Resume does not explicitly demonstrate 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions; current clear AI role began April 2025, lacking depth in required domain
Python is listed as a required language but does not appear in skills section; strong TypeScript background partially mitigates but creates a gap
No mention of vector databases, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI), or data pipeline experience with unstructured data

key_factors.factor: Recent AI/agentic workflow focus at current role
No Python or explicit vector DB/RAG expertise
